content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

Blocking: this revision is metadata-only and does not deliver the requested run lifecycle robustness changes.

## Amendments

1. The patch does not implement the requested lifecycle hardening at all: it only mutates metadata artifacts (`.ralph-burning/projects/rlm/run.json:1-74` and `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm/journal.ndjson:195-208`) and contains no hunks in the required implementation files (`src/adapters/fs.rs`, `src/cli/run.rs`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs`). Acceptance criteria items (pid tracking helpers, `run stop` command behavior, stale status detection, resume-side stale recovery, and SIGTERM-driven cleanup) are therefore not addressed in this change set.
   Rationale: `rg`/`git diff` show the only changed tracked files are project state artifacts, so required user-visible behavior changes were not made and the implementation remains unchanged.
